planSteps.description: Navigate to the game and wait for the HUD
Click SUMMON once so at least one book exists in the inventory grid
Note how many inventory cells are filled and that the first equip slot in the row above the grid reads EMPTY or shows a plus sign
Tap the inventory book to select it, then tap the first empty equip slot in the equipped row
Verify the first equip slot now displays a book with a level badge (for example Lv1) instead of the empty state
Verify the number of filled inventory cells decreased by one (the equipped book left the inventory)
